channel.title: Pattaya Gym Directory - CrossFit / Functional venues
channel.description: Latest crossfit / functional venues in the Pattaya Gym Directory.

item.title: CrossFit Pattaya @ The Jungle Gym
item.description: Pattaya's only CrossFit affiliate. Multi-discipline: CrossFit + MMA + archery + dodgeball + slacklining. Coach Murray. UA & Decathlon partners.
